2165530.name: Make me Float
2165530.description:
🎈 A Balloon-Bound Co-Op Adventure 🎈

Welcome to a kingdom where magic once ruled the skies... until an evil sorcerer plunged it into chaos. Now, the fate of the realm rests in the hands (well, strings?) of two unlikely heroes: Gus Flint, a cocky prince with zero magical training, and Poe Rob, a timid young wizard searching for his missing mother. Their quest? Reclaim the kingdom. Their problem? They’ve been turned into humanoid balloons. Yep. Balloons.

💥 What’s the Vibe?

Think whimsical medieval fantasy meets chaotic co-op platforming. You and a friend will float, bounce, and inflate your way through a vibrant world packed with puzzles, peril, and plenty of personality. But this isn’t just about saving the kingdom—it’s about saving each other.

🧠 Core Gameplay

  • Inflate to Elevate: Take turns puffing up each other’s heads to float through enchanted levels. It’s weird. It’s hilarious. It’s brilliant.

  • Teamwork is Everything: You’ll need tight coordination to dodge traps, outwit enemies, and solve puzzles. One wrong move and it’s deflation nation.

🌟 Meet the Balloon Bros

  • Gus: A prince with swagger, but not a lot of wisdom. He’s bold, brash, and totally unprepared for this magical mess. If you’re impulsive and wear your heart on your sleeve, Gus is your guy. 🎯

  • Poe: A brainy but emotionally distant sorcerer-in-training. He’s logical, cautious, and haunted by the mystery of his missing mom. If you’re a thinker with a soft spot for angsty characters, Poe’s your pick. 🧪

Together, they’ll learn to trust, grow, and maybe—just maybe—become the heroes their kingdom needs.

🎮 Key Features

  • Co-op Campaign: Play through five acts, each with three handcrafted levels. Perfect for couch co-op or online chaos.

  • Stunning Worlds: From floating libraries to magical parks, each level bursts with color, charm, and surprises.

  • Emotional Storytelling: Dive into a tale of friendship, redemption, and self-discovery. Watch Gus and Poe evolve as they face their fears—and each other.

  • Secrets & Lore: Discover hidden comics, collectibles, and off-topic lore pages that deepen the world and its mysteries.

🎉 Why You’ll Love It

If you’ve ever wanted to test your friendship, laugh until you cry, and float through a fantasy world full of heart and humor—this is your game. Make Me Float is more than a platformer. It’s a story about growing up, letting go, and learning to lift each other up (literally)

🛎️ Wishlist Make Me Float now and be the first to bounce into action when the magic hits Steam! 🛎️
2165530.supported_languages:
英语*, 蒙古语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 阿拉伯语, 保加利亚语, 捷克语, 丹麦语, 荷兰语, 芬兰语, 希腊语, 匈牙利语, 印度尼西亚语, 日语, 韩语, 挪威语, 波兰语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 葡萄牙语 - 葡萄牙, 罗马尼亚语, 俄语, 简体中文, 西班牙语 - 拉丁美洲, 瑞典语, 泰语, 繁体中文, 土耳其语, 乌克兰语, 越南语
